---
title: "Articles"
description: "Articles by Sam Hillman on real-world evidence, causal inference, agentic AI, and applying machine learning to observational health data."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
  feed:
    type: partial
    items: 20
page-layout: full
---
